caption: The video shows a close-up of a hand holding a blue pen, writing on a piece of lined paper. The hand is steady and appears to be in the process of jotting down notes or composing something. The background is slightly blurred, focusing attention on the writing action. Subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen, indicating that the person speaking enjoys reading and writing, identifies as a slam artist, and also works as a journalist. This suggests that the video might be part of an interview or a personal narrative where the individual is sharing their interests and professional roles while engaging in the act of writing.
